title: Wang Lin's Celestial Realm
content:
Wang Lin's Celestial Realm
 was created by 
Wang Lin
 following the three years vigil after the war with the 
Outer Realm
.

History
[
]

Wang Lin took the land from the 
Wind Celestial Realm
, expanded it with the dust left behind in the 
Rain Celestial Realm
 after 
Qing Lin
 reconstructed it, and then used the silver sea of the 
Lightning Celestial Realm
 to create a boundary that only Cultivators at the 
Soul Formation
 stage can cross. After that he connected this realm to his 
Unnamed Wheel Formation
 to ensure that the 
Joss Flames
 and Celestial energy from the 
Outer Realm
 is sent here. The cultivators of the 
Sealed Realm
 then took pieces from the planet souls all over the Sealed Realm to create a connection so that Soul Formation Cultivators could be sent here upon breaking through their peak.

This world was created to strengthen the Sealed Realm and Wang Lin asked 
Situ Nan
 to pass down the truth that they're living in a cave world both here and on every planet in the Sealed Realm for future generations as an insurance policy in the event that he fails to defeat the 
Seven Dao Sect
. After defeating the Seven Dao Sect, Wang Lin forcefully reincarnated the Third Step Outer Realm Cultivators onto the Immortal Astral Continent, and then sealed the Cultivation of everyone else of the Outer Realm so that their Cultivation could never reach a threatening level again. Wang Lin then left the Cave World for the Immortal Astral Continent, while the Grand Empyrean 
Xuan Luo
 took the souls of 
Situ Nan
, 
Red Butterfly
, 
Zhou Li
, 
Zhou Ru
, 
Thirteen
, 
Qing Shui
, 
Qing Lin
, 
Qing Shuang
 and 
Big Head
 to be reincarnated there.

Long after Wang Lin left the 
Cave World
, a new sect named the 
Scarlet Soul Sect
 emerged in the Sealed Realm and began launching assaults on the New Celestial Realm. After 
Wang Lin
 returned, he destroyed it thoroughly with his disciple 
Thirteen
.

Members
[
]

Current
[

Master South Cloud

Dao Master Blue Dream
